---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Evano Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

> Evano Studio is **free by default, local-first, and privacy-first**. Features
> that require a paid API, a cloud service, or that upload user data by default
> are out of scope. See [docs/FREE_BY_DEFAULT.md](../../docs/FREE_BY_DEFAULT.md).

## Problem

What problem would this solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Stays local & free?

- [ ] Works **locally** without a paid/cloud service
- [ ] No user data uploaded by default
- [ ] Fits the desktop "control center" experience (no terminal required for users)

## Additional context

Anything else (mockups, examples, links).
